\tzpentry{ID3949}{Partial Quantum State Wave Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3949 introduces Partial Quantum State Wave Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\nabla^2 \\Psi - \\frac{\\partial^2 \\Psi}{\\partial t^2} = J_{TZP}\n\\]
